description: Fixture demo-bank contract. Hashes are fixture identities, not committed audio.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Break transient is the hardest element, the hook arrives immediately, and the restore gives the player a clear stage moment.

musical_summary.hook_within_two_bars: Clear W-30 break hook appears inside the first bar.
musical_summary.hardest_audible_element: Snare and break transient lead the impact.
musical_summary.destructive_contrast: Dropout and restore create obvious contrast.
musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Drum body and bass lift support the hook without masking it.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: Dropout, stutter, and restore would read as playable live gestures.
musical_summary.eight_bar_replay_value: The hook, pressure, and restore give a reason to replay after eight bars.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Technically shaped but the hook and bass pressure are not strong enough for a musician-facing demo.

musical_summary.hook_within_two_bars: Hook exists but is not memorable enough.
musical_summary.hardest_audible_element: Chop is audible but does not dominate.
musical_summary.source_character: Source is present enough to fix rather than discard.
musical_summary.destructive_contrast: Contrast is present but not the weakness.
musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Bass pressure is weak and needs more physical low-end movement.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: Gestures change state, but not the room enough yet.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Collapsed output with no clear hook, no pressure, and no useful source identity; preserved only as a failure example.

musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Bass and drum pressure are missing.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: No live gesture would be worth triggering.
musical_summary.eight_bar_replay_value: No reason to keep listening after eight bars.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Tonal source becomes a playable riff rather than a source-copy loop, with enough pressure support to show non-dense range.

musical_summary.hook_within_two_bars: The tonal riff reads as the hook immediately.
musical_summary.hardest_audible_element: The chop/riff is the focal impact.
musical_summary.source_character: Source character stays transformed but present.
musical_summary.destructive_contrast: Contrast is present enough for a tonal demo.
musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Bass support is present without burying the riff.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: Retriggering the riff would be musically meaningful.
musical_summary.eight_bar_replay_value: The riff identity gives replay value after eight bars.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Useful non-dense pressure example, but hook and destructive contrast still need work before demo promotion.

musical_summary.hardest_audible_element: Bass body is the strongest element.
musical_summary.destructive_contrast: Stop/restore contrast is not sharp enough.
musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Pressure is present but not enough by itself.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: Pressure gesture is useful, but needs a sharper live change.
musical_summary.eight_bar_replay_value: Medium replay value; not enough for demo-ready.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Pad/noise edge-source candidate is indexed for review because it uses the pad_noise policy path, but it remains unverified until a human decides whether the texture/gate gesture is playable.

musical_summary.hook_within_two_bars: Unverified: candidate may become a gated texture/stab rather than a tonal hook.
musical_summary.hardest_audible_element: Unverified: texture gate or silence contrast may be the strongest element.
musical_summary.source_character: Unverified: pad/noise source character should survive as transformed texture.
musical_summary.destructive_contrast: Unverified: soft attacks need stronger cut or gate contrast before demo promotion.
musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Unverified: pressure is secondary for this source family.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: Unverified: candidate should be judged as a live texture or stab trigger.
musical_summary.eight_bar_replay_value: Unverified: no replay-value claim until structured listening review.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Updated sparse-bass-pressure candidate is indexed for review from the professional source WAV pack, but it remains unverified until a listener confirms pressure and gesture quality.

musical_summary.hook_within_two_bars: Unverified: sparse source still needs a memorable first-two-bar gesture.
musical_summary.hardest_audible_element: Unverified: bass body or kick pressure should be the hardest element.
musical_summary.source_character: Unverified: sparse kick/snare identity should remain present.
musical_summary.destructive_contrast: Unverified: stop/restore contrast still needs listening review.
musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Unverified: candidate targets stronger physical low-end pressure.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: Unverified: pressure gesture should be judged as a playable live move.
musical_summary.eight_bar_replay_value: Unverified: no replay-value claim until structured listening review.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Bad-timing Beat20 candidate is indexed for review because it exercises candidate_ambiguous/manual_confirm_only timing, but it remains unverified and must not imply bar-locked confidence.

musical_summary.hook_within_two_bars: Unverified: timing ambiguity may prevent a confident first-two-bar hook.
musical_summary.hardest_audible_element: Unverified: confirmation cue or cautious pressure should be the clearest event.
musical_summary.source_character: Unverified: Beat20 source character should remain audible without pretending timing is locked.
musical_summary.destructive_contrast: Unverified: destructive moves must stay cautious until downbeat risk is resolved.
musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Unverified: bass and drum pressure should avoid false bar-locked placement.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: Unverified: candidate should help a player understand when manual timing confirmation is needed.
musical_summary.eight_bar_replay_value: Unverified: no replay-value claim until structured listening review confirms the timing-risk gesture works.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Weak-source Beat20 rejection candidate is indexed so weak material stays visible and routes to source-selection or transformation fixes, but it remains unverified and not demo-ready.

musical_summary.hook_within_two_bars: Unverified: weak material may not produce a usable hook without stronger transformation.
musical_summary.hardest_audible_element: Unverified: no element should be assumed to hit hard enough for a demo.
musical_summary.source_character: Unverified: this candidate is anchored to a source-character failure path.
musical_summary.destructive_contrast: Unverified: destructive contrast may not rescue a weak source.
musical_summary.bass_drum_pressure: Unverified: pressure must not hide missing source payoff.
musical_summary.live_triggerability: Unverified: review should decide whether this should be transformed further or rejected.
musical_summary.eight_bar_replay_value: Unverified: no replay-value claim until structured listening review finds a reason to keep it.

entries.demo_worthiness_note: Candidate is indexed for review, but it must remain unverified until a structured human verdict exists.

musical_summary.hook_within_two_bars: Candidate claims a possible hook, unverified by human listening.
musical_summary.source_character: Source character is unverified by human listening.
